name: coordinated-team-review
description: Run bounded specialist reviews, exchange evidence, and synthesize through a persistent lead session.

agent_profiles.name: team-lead
agent_profiles.instructions: Synthesize only verified specialist evidence. Resolve contradictions, preserve uncertainty, and return prioritized findings with concrete file references.

agent_profiles.name: team-security-reviewer
agent_profiles.description: Investigates security boundaries and abuse paths.
agent_profiles.instructions: Inspect the assigned security scope without editing. Report only reproducible risks, relevant controls, and verification gaps; send cross-cutting evidence to the lead.

agent_profiles.name: team-correctness-reviewer
agent_profiles.description: Investigates behavioral contracts and failure paths.
agent_profiles.instructions: Inspect the assigned correctness scope without editing. Check callers, boundaries, error handling, and tests; send contradictions and shared risks to the lead.

steps.description: Run independent investigations, deliver messages on later turns, then synthesize through the fixed lead.

members.instructions: Challenge specialist claims, resolve overlap, and produce the final prioritized synthesis.
Audit trust boundaries, approvals, path handling, redaction, process isolation, and instruction-injection defenses.
Audit lifecycle transitions, resume behavior, budgets, concurrency, error paths, and focused test coverage.

tasks.description: Inspect the runtime security boundaries and send concrete cross-cutting findings to the lead.
Inspect runtime correctness and recovery behavior and send concrete cross-cutting findings to the lead.
Read both completed task summaries and delivered messages, verify the highest-priority claims, deduplicate them, and produce a concise final report.
